levels.name: Tutorial
levels.tutorial: Welcome to Dungeon Shift! This tutorial will teach you everything you need to know.

tutorialSteps.message: Welcome to Dungeon Shift! This is a puzzle game where the dungeon shifts after every move. Let's learn the basics!
Use ARROW KEYS or WASD to move your character. Try moving now!
Great! Notice the MOVES counter at the top left. You have limited moves per level!
See your HP (hearts) at the top? You have 3 health points. Taking damage reduces your HP!
After each move, the dungeon SHIFTS! Rooms swap positions. The maze rearranges itself!
Watch the 'Next Shift' indicator on the right! It shows which rooms will swap next.
Gray blocks are WALLS. You cannot walk through them. Plan your path carefully!
The yellow icon is a KEY. Collect keys to unlock the exit! Now explore and collect the key!
Excellent! You collected the key. Check the key counter at the top!
Gray spikes are SPIKE TRAPS. They damage you when you step on them. Avoid them!
Red enemies are PATROLLERS. They move along set paths. Don't touch them or you'll take damage!
Press [U] or click the UNDO button (bottom-left) to undo moves. You have 5 undos per level!
Press [H] or click HINT button for help. You get 1 hint per level (reduces undos to 3)!
Press [P] for SOLUTION (bottom-right). Solutions unlock after completing a level once!
Press [ESC] to open the PAUSE MENU (top-right). You can restart or quit from there!
Press [M] to MUTE/UNMUTE audio (top-right). Toggle sound effects and music anytime!
The purple portal is the EXIT. Reach it with all required keys to win!
That's everything! Now complete this tutorial level. Good luck!

levels.name: First Steps
levels.tutorial: Welcome! Use arrow keys or WASD to move. Collect the key and reach the exit!
levels.hint: This is a simple level to learn the basics. Just move to the key in the center, then to the exit in the bottom-right. The rooms shift after each move, but there's plenty of space!

levels.name: Shifting Rooms
levels.tutorial: The dungeon shifts after each move! Watch the shift indicator to plan your route.
levels.hint: Watch the 'Next Shift' indicator in the top-right. It shows which rooms will swap. Time your movements so you end up in the correct room after the shift. Use Undo (U key) to try different approaches!

levels.name: Dangerous Ground
levels.tutorial: Beware of spike traps! They activate when you step on them and deal damage.

levels.name: Timed Assault
levels.tutorial: Arrow traps fire on a timer! Watch for the warning flash and time your movements carefully.

levels.name: Fragile Path
levels.tutorial: Cracked floors break after two steps! Plan your route carefully to avoid getting trapped.

levels.name: Living Dungeon
levels.tutorial: Enemies patrol the dungeon! Watch their patterns and time your moves to avoid them.

levels.name: The Chase
levels.tutorial: Chasers hunt you down! They move every 2 turns. Use walls and shifts to create escape routes!

levels.name: Guardian's Domain
levels.tutorial: Guards attack adjacent tiles on even turns! Use anchors to control shifts and switches to change patterns.

levels.name: Gauntlet
levels.tutorial: The ultimate test! All hazards, all enemies, tight time limit. Use every tool at your disposal!

levels.name: The Final Shift
levels.tutorial: This is it - the final challenge! Master all mechanics, defeat all enemies, and escape before the dungeon collapses. Good luck!
